itinerary.title: Premium Complete Mizoram Family Tour
itinerary.tagline: Aizawl • Reiek Mountain • Vantawng Falls • Tamdil Lake • Phawngpui Blue Mountain • Cultural Heritage
itinerary.overview:
TRAGUIN PREMIUM COMPLETE MIZORAM FAMILY TOUR — Aizawl • Reiek Mountain • Vantawng Falls • Tamdil Lake • Phawngpui Blue Mountain • Cultural Heritage. 07 Nights / 08 Days The Complete Mizoram Family Discovery Expedition.

TOUR OVERVIEW
Embark on the ultimate journey through the hills, culture, and nature of Mizoram. This TRAGUIN curated expedition covers the absolute best of the state, blending cultural heritage in Aizawl, stunning mountain peaks, waterfalls, and serene lakes. Designed for families wanting the complete experience, this itinerary creates unforgettable memories in the heart of Northeast India's pristine landscape.
itinerary.seo_title: MZ-010 | Premium Complete Mizoram Family Tour | TRAGUIN
itinerary.seo_description: Premium 07 Nights / 08 Days Mizoram package (MZ-010 / TRG-MIZ-CMP-2026): Aizawl • Reiek Mountain • Vantawng Falls • Tamdil Lake • Phawngpui Blue Mountain • Cultural Heritage with 4-tier handpicked accommodation.

days.title: ARRIVAL IN AIZAWL & MOUNTAIN WELCOME
days.description: Arrive in Aizawl. Private transfer to your handpicked premium resort. Enjoy a quiet evening with panoramic valley vistas.
activities: Quiet evening with panoramic valley vistas.

days.title: AIZAWL CULTURAL HERITAGE
days.description: Comprehensive tour of Aizawl's museums and heritage centers, discovering the history and iconic attractions of Mizo society.
activities: Comprehensive museums and heritage centers tour.
History and iconic attractions of Mizo society.

days.title: REIEK MOUNTAIN & HERITAGE VILLAGE
days.description: Excursion to Reiek Mountain. Explore the heritage village and enjoy local traditions, offering a fantastic family experience in the hills.
activities: Reiek Mountain excursion and heritage village.
Local traditions and family hill experience.

days.title: VANTAWNG FALLS & NATURAL WONDERS
days.description: Witness the awe-inspiring Vantawng Falls and explore the surrounding lush valleys, capturing breathtaking landscapes together.
activities: Vantawng Falls and lush surrounding valleys.

days.title: TAMDIL LAKE LEISURE
days.description: Enjoy a day of tranquility at Tamdil Lake. Boating, relaxation, and exploring the serene natural environment at a family-friendly pace.
activities: Boating, relaxation, and serene natural environment.

days.title: PHAWNGPUI BLUE MOUNTAIN SOJOURN
days.description: Journey to Phawngpui, the Blue Mountain. Experience the scenic beauty of the highest peak, offering panoramic views of the hills.
activities: Panoramic views from Mizoram's highest peak.

days.title: CULTURAL GALA & FAREWELL
days.description: A final day for local exploration, interactive craft sessions, and a grand family farewell dinner gala, creating unforgettable memories.
activities: Local exploration and interactive craft sessions.
Meals Included: MAPAI Breakfast & Farewell Gala Dinner

days.title: DEPARTURE
days.description: Final breakfast before your TRAGUIN private transfer, completing your complete Mizoram family expedition.

inclusions.text: Premium Stays: 7 Nights in handpicked Mizoram properties as per chosen category.
Luxury Transportation: Private dedicated Luxury SUV for all transfers and sightseeing.
Curated Meal Plan: MAPAI — daily breakfast and dinner at handpicked venues.
TRAGUIN Support: 24/7 dedicated guest experience manager on call.
Private Transfers: Airport/railway arrival and departure transfers in premium AC vehicle.
Handpicked Stays: TRAGUIN-vetted accommodations matching your selected tier.
All applicable taxes, driver allowances, tolls, and parking charges for the private vehicle.
Comprehensive family sightseeing covering Aizawl heritage, Reiek, Vantawng Falls, Tamdil Lake, and Phawngpui.
Airfare, domestic flight bookings, or train tickets.
